experience.description: Developed features related to smart lock functionalities, including an IoT system combining a smart lock with smartphone control for unlocking, temporary key codes, firmware updates, door locking, abnormal activity alerts, and unlock history.
Developed an Android app for online movie ticket booking with features such as viewing showtimes, movie details, booking tickets, seat selection, payment, booking history, and reviews.
Developed a full-featured Android app for managing student information, including adding, deleting, and editing student details, viewing timetables, study paths, and lecturer teaching lists.
Developed an e-commerce website with typical functions like viewing order details, purchasing, adding to cart, viewing product information, payment, and a separate Admin website for product updates.

Implemented a comprehensive Work Management system, including Employee Management and Work Tracking, managing member information across departments, coordinating work, and maintaining a central database.
